payload.label: chair
payload.short_description: dark red wooden barstool chair with leather seat
payload.long_description: Glossy dark red/brown wooden barstool-style chair with a round padded black leather seat, carved ornate backrest and turned legs with a circular footrest; slightly edge-cropped at the top/left and photographed close to the camera (about 1.0 m away).
